privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for suite_crm_env complete_post_meeting_workflow task by confirming that the target meeting 'Global Widgets - Q3 Roadmap Sync' and its ID 'meeting-q3-sync-0001' are synthetically injected into the SuiteCRM database via setup_task.sh SQL query. Verified that export_result.sh expects a note with subject 'Q3 Roadmap Sync - Minutes' and a task with subject 'Draft Q3 SLA Addendum', exactly matching the task description.
